affiliation: Columbia University in the City of New York
introduction: Fei Song attained the B.E. degree in optoelectronic information science and engineering from University of Electronic Science and Technology of China (UESTC), Chengdu, China, in 2022. Subsequently, he received the M.Phil. degree in Microelectronics from University of Macau (UM), Macau SAR, China, in 2025. From July 2025 to Dec. 2025, he was a research assistant at Power X Lab.
